name: Ham-Linguine Florentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the linguine according to package directions. Let the linguine sit in the water while finishing the recipe.
2. In a large saucepan, cook almonds over medium heat about 1-2 minutes or until golden, stirring constantly. Remove almonds from pan and set aside.
3. In the same pan, cook mushrooms and onion in broth about 2 minutes or just till vegetables are tender.
4. Combine milk and cornstarch and mix well.
5. Stir the milk mixture and marjoram into the pan. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture is thickened and bubbly.
6. Cook and stir for 1 minute more.
7. Stir ham, mustard, and parsley into the saucepan; heat through.
8. Stir in the spinach and heat til just wilted.
9. Stir in linguine and place on plates.
10. Sprinkle toasted almonds over all.
